zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Godwin於從1075年1月7日到1076年1月6日出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Edmund29歲，母親Mrs Godwin Haroldson27歲。她於1109年與Botolph de Stourton在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世在英國維爾爾斯圖頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Godwin于从1075年1月7日到1076年1月6日出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Edmund29岁，母亲Mrs Godwin Haroldson27岁。她于1109年与Botolph de Stourton在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世在英国維爾爾斯圖頓。

nameMeanings.name: Godwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the common Old English personal name Godwine, a compound of god ‘god’ + wine ‘friend, protector, lord’, which survived the Conquest. Compare Goodwin , with which it has most probably been confused.
alternatively, the name may occasionally derive from an Old English female personal name Godwynn.

variants.name: Goodwin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Godwin (Old English Gōdwine). Compare Godwin .
Irish: adopted in Mayo for Ó Goidín, a variant of Ó Godáin, ‘descendant of Godán’, a diminutive personal name from got ‘stammering, lisping’.

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. William Goodwin was one of the founders of Hartford, CT, in 1635 (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker).

variants.name: Juden
meanings: English (of Norman and French Huguenot origin): from the Old French personal name Gelduin, from ancient Germanic Geldewin, a compound of geld ‘gold’ and win ‘friend’. In Anglo-Norman England the Old French personal name was sometimes confused with similar Old English names, such as Godwine or Gōdwine (see Godwin , Goodwin ).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Godwin was born from 7 January 1075 to 6 January 1076, in Kent, England, her father, Edmund, was 29 and her mother, Mrs Godwin Haroldson, was 27. She married Botolph de Stourton in 1109, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in Stourton, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Godwin est née du 7 janvier 1075 au 6 janvier 1076, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Edmund, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mrs Godwin Haroldson, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Botolph de Stourton en 1109, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Godwin von 7. Januar 1075 bis 6. Januar 1076 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund 29 und ihre Mutter Mrs Godwin Haroldson 27. Sie hat 1109 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Botolph de Stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb in Stourton, Wiltshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Godwin è nata il da 7 gennaio 1075 a 6 gennaio 1076 nel Kent, England, sua padre, Edmund, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mrs Godwin Haroldson, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Botolph de Stourton nel 1109, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel Stourton, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Godwinがから1075年1月7日まで1076年1月6日にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Edmundは29歳，母Mrs Godwin Haroldsonは27歳であった。1109年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでBotolph de Stourtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Godwin(이)가 1075년 1월 7일부터 1076년 1월 6일까지 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Godwin Haroldson(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1109년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Botolph de Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Godwin родилась с 7 января 1075 по 6 января 1076 в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Godwin Haroldson, 27.
